description: Worklist for the threat-actor-updater task. Other tasks queue items here when they encounter threat actors that need new pages or linkage updates. The updater processes this queue on Tue/Thu.

queue.context: FulcrumSec exploited React2Shell vulnerability to breach LexisNexis AWS infrastructure, exfiltrating 2.04GB of data including government user profiles. Known for targeting cloud infrastructure and public shaming/data leaks.
Mr. Raccoon breached Adobe through an Indian BPO contractor using RAT deployment and spear-phishing, exfiltrating 13M support tickets, 15K employee records, and HackerOne bug bounty submissions.
Russian-speaking ransomware group that compromised Die Linke political party, claiming 1.5TB of data. Financially and politically motivated. Party described attack as potential hybrid warfare.
Storm-2372 identified as one of the threat groups using EvilTokens PhaaS for M365 OAuth device code phishing campaign targeting 340+ organizations.

queue.notes: Chinese-nexus threat actor targeting SE Asian governments via TrueConf zero-day. Moderate confidence attribution per Check Point Research.
Crisis24/CodeRED platform was breached in Nov 2025; municipal credentials stolen. Potentially related to Patriot Regional attack.

queue.context: Lapsus$ extortion group claimed 4TB of data from Mercor AI after TeamPCP's LiteLLM supply chain compromise. Data includes source code, Slack comms, database records, and AI system conversation videos. Customers affected include Meta, OpenAI, Anthropic.

actions.create: Threat actor not found in threat-actor-index.json — needs a new entry in threat-actors.html with full research (aliases, affiliation, motivation, tools, campaigns, description)
actions.update-links: Threat actor exists but a new incident report references them — update their campaigns/description and ensure bidirectional linking
actions.enrich: Threat actor exists but has thin data — research and expand their entry

priority.critical: Actor tied to active/ongoing campaign affecting critical infrastructure
priority.high: Actor tied to multiple recent incidents in the manifest
priority.low: Historical actor with no recent activity, fill when capacity allows

queueRules.dedup: Before adding to queue, check if an item with the same actorName and action already exists. If so, merge referencedFrom arrays instead of adding a duplicate.
